name: Curly Maple's Applesauce Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the sugar and softened butter in a mixing bowl.
2. Add the eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Combine the dry ingredients (flour, baking powder, cinnamon, baking soda, ginger, and salt) in a separate bowl.
4. Alternate adding the dry mixture and applesauce to the creamed mixture until just combined.
5. Fill greased or paper-lined muffin cups about 2/3 full.
6. Sprinkle sugar on top of each muffin.
7. Bake at 350°F for 20-25 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Cool on a wire rack.
